settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Some preferences are stored locally in your browser only and not synced to the server.

profile.syncedFromHint: Synced from your account — not editable here.

aiProviders.infoBanner: Your API keys are stored encrypted on StudyDeck's servers, tied to your account. They are used server-side to reach your AI provider and are never returned to the browser.
aiProviders.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one above.
aiProviders.providerSaveErrorToast: Failed to save provider. Please try again.
aiProviders.providerRemoveErrorToast: Failed to remove provider. Please try again.
aiProviders.providerActivateErrorToast: Failed to activate provider. Please try again.
aiProviders.removeDialogDescription: This will permanently delete the provider and its encrypted key from the server.
aiProviders.migrationBannerBody: Your API keys are no longer stored in the browser. To continue using AI features, please re-enter your key below — it will be stored encrypted on the server.
aiProviders.cryptoUnavailableError: Encryption is not configured on the server. Contact your administrator.

study.dailyGoalHint: Synced to your account — drives the sidebar goal and progress.

account.title: Account
account.sessionHint: Only your current session is shown. Multi-session management is not yet available.
account.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
account.revokeDialogDescription: This will sign out the selected device immediately.
